creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
> ++CFLAGS += -g -Wall -pedantic $(MISCOPT) -DMAGNIFY=0
 
 I suppose "-g" flag shouldn't needed at this situation.
 
 Then, we have to honor CC,X11BASE etc.
 
 ...like this. :-)
 
 diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/Makefile x11-servers/Xfstt/Makefile
 --- /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/Makefile	Tue Jan 18 21:49:33 2000
 +++ x11-servers/Xfstt/Makefile	Sat Mar 18 10:22:10 2000
 @@ -1,29 +1,29 @@
  # New ports collection makefile for:	Xfstt
 -# Version required:	1.0
 +# Version required:	1.1
  # Date created:		11 September 1998
  # Whom:			jabley@clear.co.nz
  #
  # $FreeBSD: ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/Makefile,v 1.5 2000/01/18 07:43:02 nbm Exp $
  #
  
 -DISTNAME=	xfstt-1.0
 +DISTNAME=	xfstt-1.1
  CATEGORIES=	x11-servers
  MASTER_SITES=	$(MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE)
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	X11/fonts
  
  MAINTAINER=	rip@pinetec.co.za
  
 -WRKSRC=		$(WRKDIR)/xfstt-1.0
 -
  USE_X_PREFIX=	yes
  MAN1=		xfstt.1
  
 +post-patch:
 +	@${PERL} -pi -e "s|%%X11BASE%%|${X11BASE}|g" ${WRKSRC}/*.cpp
 +
  do-install:
  	$(INSTALL_PROGRAM) $(WRKSRC)/xfstt $(PREFIX)/bin
  	$(INSTALL_MAN) $(WRKSRC)/xfstt.1x $(PREFIX)/man/man1/xfstt.1
  
  post-install:
 -	strip $(PREFIX)/bin/xfstt
  .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
  	$(MKDIR) $(PREFIX)/share/doc/xfstt
  	$(INSTALL_DATA) $(WRKSRC)/FAQ $(PREFIX)/share/doc/xfstt
 diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/files/md5 x11-servers/Xfstt/files/md5
 --- /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/files/md5	Sat Dec 25 21:26:22 1999
 +++ x11-servers/Xfstt/files/md5	Sat Mar 18 10:03:04 2000
 @@ -1 +1 @@
 -MD5 (xfstt-1.0.tar.gz) = 1c5809f3f64c5000d86bed1baa25b616
 +MD5 (xfstt-1.1.tar.gz) = e6588126aa49a5a50458591948424209
 diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-aa x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-aa
 --- /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-aa	Thu Dec 24 15:36:08 1998
 +++ x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-aa	Sat Mar 18 10:38:16 2000
 @@ -1,30 +1,34 @@
 ---- Makefile.orig	Sun Oct 25 11:21:12 1998
 -+++ Makefile	Wed Dec 23 19:32:02 1998
 -@@ -2,13 +2,13 @@
 +--- Makefile.orig	Mon May 31 15:28:44 1999
 ++++ Makefile	Sat Mar 18 10:38:07 2000
 +@@ -2,16 +2,16 @@
   MISCOPT =
   OPT = $(MISCOPT) $(MAXOPT)
   
  -CFLAGS = $(OPT) -DMAGNIFY=0 -DNDEBUG
  +#CFLAGS = $(OPT) -DMAGNIFY=0 -DNDEBUG
   #CFLAGS = -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -DMAGNIFY=0
 - CFLAGS = -g -Wall -pedantic $(MISCOPT) -DMAGNIFY=0
 +-CFLAGS = -g -Wall -pedantic $(MISCOPT) -DMAGNIFY=0
 ++CFLAGS += -pedantic $(MISCOPT) -DMAGNIFY=0
   #CFLAGS = -O -Wall -pedantic -DDEBUG $(MISCOPT)
   
 --LFLAGS = -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L/usr/openwin/lib/X11
 + LFLAGS = -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L/usr/openwin/lib/X11
  -LFLAGS = -g -L/usr/X11R6/lib
 -+#LFLAGS = -L/usr/X11R6/lib -L/usr/openwin/lib/X11
 -+LFLAGS = -g -L$(X11BASE)/lib
 ++LFLAGS = -L$(X11BASE)/lib
   
 - CC = c++
 - LD = c++
 -@@ -55,8 +55,8 @@
 +-CC = c++
 +-LD = c++
 ++CC ?= c++
 ++LD = $(CC)
 + 
 + OBJS =	RAFile.o	\
 + 	TTFont.o	\
 +@@ -56,8 +56,7 @@
   	$(LD) -o $@ $(OBJS) xfstt.o encoding.o $(LFLAGS) -lm
   
   xfstt.o : xfstt.cpp xfstt.h ttf.h arch.h Makefile
  -	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $< -I/usr/X11R6/include/X11/fonts	\
  -		-I/usr/X11R6/include/
 -+	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $< -I$(X11BASE)/include/X11/fonts	\
 -+		-I$(X11BASE)/include/
 ++	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $< -I$(X11BASE)/include
   
   encoding.o : encoding.cpp encoding.h Makefile
   	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $<
 diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ab x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ab
 --- /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ab	Sat Dec 25 21:26:22 1999
 +++ x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ab	Sat Mar 18 10:11:00 2000
 @@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 ---- xfstt.cpp.orig	Fri Nov  5 00:49:57 1999
 -+++ xfstt.cpp	Mon Dec  6 17:01:54 1999
 +--- xfstt.cpp.orig	Sun Dec 12 03:23:45 1999
 ++++ xfstt.cpp	Sat Mar 18 10:10:45 2000
  @@ -11,8 +11,8 @@
   #define UNSTRAPLIMIT	10500U
   
   // Change these if you don't lie being FHS complient
  -#define TTFONTDIR	"/usr/share/fonts/truetype"
  -#define TTCACHEDIR      "/var/cache/xfstt"
 -+#define TTFONTDIR	"/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType"
 -+#define TTCACHEDIR      "/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType"
 ++#define TTFONTDIR	"%%X11BASE%%/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType"
 ++#define TTCACHEDIR      "%%X11BASE%%/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType"
   
   #define TTINFO_LEAF     "ttinfo.dir"
   #define TTNAME_LEAF     "ttname.dir"
 diff -urN /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ac x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ac
 --- /usr/ports/x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ac	Sat Dec 25 21:26:22 1999
 +++ x11-servers/Xfstt/patches/patch-ac	Sat Mar 18 10:11:51 2000
 @@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 ---- perftest.cpp.orig	Sat Jan  9 04:11:04 1999
 -+++ perftest.cpp	Mon Dec  6 16:53:06 1999
 +--- perftest.cpp.orig	Sat Jan  9 11:11:04 1999
 ++++ perftest.cpp	Sat Mar 18 10:11:43 2000
  @@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
   // test ttf engine performance
   // (C) Copyright 1997-1998 Herbert Duerr
   
  -#define TTFONTDIR	"/usr/share/fonts/truetype"
 -+#define TTFONTDIR	"/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType"
 ++#define TTFONTDIR	"%%X11BASE%%/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType"
   #define MAXFONTBUFSIZE (2048*2048)
   
   #include "ttf.h"
 
 
 
 -- 
 KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
